title: An Act to Establish Standards for Independent Motor Vehicle Repair Facilities in Maine
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 21, 2025
last_house_action: 4/3/2025 - Committee on TRANSPORTATION suggested and ordered printed. On motion of Representative CRAFTS of Newcastle, the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HOUSING AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/21/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on TRANSPORTATION suggested and ordered printed. On motion of Representative CRAFTS of Newcastle, the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HOUSING AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HOUSING AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
